message: Jake
Garrison
Reception A
Welcome to the NETS baseball team office.
Reception B
Ah, you are
Please wait a moment.
The girl at reception picked up the receiver and called the team's PR representative,
Mr. .
Oh, has there been any news from Guy?
Well, well, I wondered who it was.
There's really nothing to talk about, no matter how many times you come.
Look
Talk
Listen
Think
Move
System
Surroundings
Guy's matter
About Guy
Things about him
To another location
Save
Exit the game
The reception, placed alone in a spacious area, makes me wonder how one is supposed to enter.
I wonder if that's their uniform?
Just us here makes this vast space feel quite lonely.
He seems like a nice guy at first glance, but who knows what kind of true self is hidden behind that gentle face?
It's not exactly adorable, but there's a certain charm to his face. Thanks to this face,
he's probably benefitting quite a bit.
In an orthodox brown suit with a pressed shirt. He looks completely different from the sweaty, clumsy players.
Did you hear from Guy?
No, nothing has come to me yet.
Has he contacted the baseball team?
No, not at all. What on earth is going on?
By the way, have you been living a drug-free life?
Yes.
What's with that?
Well, that's great.
You know, many of our players can't function without using upper drugs. It's a real headache.
I'd like you and Guy to teach me how to cut ties with drugs, ha ha ha.
There’s just over a month until the season starts.
This winter has been unusually mild and pleasant.
That's true.
Is this climate change?
From now on, things are going to get busy again.
Guy has become a troublesome guy.
Yeah.
I really wonder where he is and what he’s doing.
He’s definitely a popular player, but he shouldn’t get cocky. He was such a good young man when he first joined.
Time surely changes people. Guy has changed, that's clear.
I haven’t seen him much since he joined, so I never thought he’d be a guy to do things like this.
That's right, I understand.
I’m looking forward to his contact, but what is going on?
After that, Guy...
I thought he might be dying somewhere by now.
No way, that’s bad luck to say.
It’s really sad when a popular player disappears.
What was Guy like back in school?
He was a strong sense of justice and a good young man who kept his promises.
Huh.
Now he’s...
We have a real problem here.
It would be nice if I could at least confirm that he's alive.
Guy was a man who would never break a promise. It's strange that he would quietly run away just before contract negotiations.
I wonder if he's at least contacted the baseball team?
This guy is more annoying than he looks, poking at pasts people want to forget.
Even if there was a message from Guy, would he really tell me?
Please let me know if you find out anything about Guy.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
